content.en:
In the War Domain Realm, the Library Pavilion of the War Hall is naturally far inferior to the Library Pavilion in the War Gate.

But Ye Qingtian couldn't go to the battle gate, so he could only check it here.

The library of the War Hall contains a lot of classics, and many of them still need points from the Battle Gate, and Ye Tian, as the Holy Son, naturally has some points, but most of the classics are still open to him, the Holy Son, for free.

Ye Tian kept searching, and specialized in finding classics such as talent.

I have to say that the Dark Sanctuary has studied talent very thoroughly, far beyond the imagination of the Xuan Xuan to the Ancient Realm.

In the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, if you want to give birth to a super god-level talent, you need to pay a certain price, and you can only do it by using treasures that can increase your talent.

However, the Dark Sanctuary actually had a special secret technique that directly made his talent continue to improve and be promoted to the super god level.

Of course, such a secret technique is also very precious, and it can increase up to three super god-level talents.

But even so, this is very wicked.

For example, Ye Tian valued a secret technique, the Golden Illusion Soul Technique, which allowed one person to give birth to three super-god-level talents, and could also improve some soul potential and foundation.

This arcane art works best against humanoid beings, the only flaw is that it is painful.

Cultivating this secret technique is to temper and destroy the soul again and again, and only those with strong wills can practice it.

But once such a secret technique spreads among the human race, the human race will inevitably give birth to a large number of geniuses.

It can be said that in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, such a secret technique is more precious than any number of forbidden treasures, and it belongs to the top inheritance.

"100 points, not much!"

Ye Tian's initial points as a holy son were 1,000 points, so he easily exchanged this secret art inheritance and brought it back as the supreme secret art of the human race in the future.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to search for the classics of talent, and finally found a book that recorded the holy endowment.

And the texts that record the Holy Endowment are only a few sentences above that mention the Holy Endowment.

According to the above, the Holy Endowment is a supreme talent that overrides the forbidden talent, and there is no way to give it with treasures, it can only be born by nature, and ordinary creatures cannot be born at all.

Only the heirs born by the Supreme Domain Ancestor Couple have a small chance of giving birth to the Saint Fu Heir.

But it is also very difficult for the Supreme Ancestor couple to give birth to an heir, and after a long period of hard work, there is hope to give birth to one.

Therefore, the Holy Endowment is almost a legend in the Dark Sanctuary, and even if there is a Holy Endowment, people will not say it.

Therefore, there is not much mention of the knowledge of the Holy Endowment in this text.

But what are the benefits of the Holy Endowment, but it is mentioned above.

The owner of the Holy Endowment can cultivate the Holy Technique!

The Holy Technique is a secret technique that is even more terrifying than the Domain Technique, and it is difficult for even the Supreme Domain Ancestor to cultivate a Sacred Technique, let alone cultivate the Holy Technique to a higher realm.

For example, Ye Tian has such a holy endowment, he can cultivate the holy technique now!

Ye Tian wanted to find the inheritance of the Holy Technique here, but he didn't find it.

Obviously, the inheritance of sacred skills is very precious, and there must be no such thing here.

Ye Tian didn't want to use the Holy Technique for now, but went back to continue to fuse other forbidden talents.

Soon after, he fused into a holy gift again!

【Holy Endowment: Golden Body】

It's a defensive gift!

In the following days, Ye Tian's holy endowments were born one after another.

Some types of forbidden talents were not sufficient to transform, so he went to independent spaces one by one to copy the forbidden talents of other half-step domain ancestors.

Even if there are few forbidden talents, there are too many half-step domain ancestors here, so he has copied many, many forbidden talents.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed.

In the past hundred years, he has visited almost all of the independent spaces, and only a few independent spaces that he is not allowed to enter, he has not entered.

And in the past hundred years, the ancestors of the half-step domain have come and gone, and the forbidden talents he has copied can be imagined.

As a result, he gave birth to a number of holy endowments.

【Holy Endowment: Hegemony】

【Holy Endowment: True Fire】

【Holy Gift: Ice Cream】

【Holy Gift: Aurora】

【Holy Endowment: Rock Thorn】

......

More than a dozen kinds of holy endowments gathered on Ye Tian's body, one can imagine what a terrifying thing this is.

Fused into more than a dozen holy endowments, Ye Tian did not continue to copy the forbidden talent for the time being, if he encountered a new copy talent, then it would not matter if he copied it.

But now, he still wanted to cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body.

He didn't cultivate in the Battle Realm Tower, after all, this is a holy relic controlled by the Battle Gate, who knows if it will be spied on?

The fusion talent is carried out in the soul and cannot be detected, and the ability to replicate the body is easy to snoop on.

So, Ye Tian left the Battle Realm Tower and returned to the outside world.

When Ye Tian returned to the outside world, he found that the Forbidden Void Realm where the War Realm Tower's projection tower was located was already very lively, and it had been transformed into a prosperous Void Realm by major forces, and there were even countless more cities and buildings.

Ye Tian returned to the human realm, and then placed the secret technique of the Golden Illusion Soul Technique in the temple of the human race.

In the future, the geniuses of the human race can cultivate this secret art, but he has set a limit, if he wants to practice this secret art, he must make a soul oath and promise not to leak it out before he can practice this secret art.

As for the promotion of the whole clan, then there is no need, because the threshold for cultivating this secret art is already relatively high, and it is also very painful, if you let ordinary people cultivate, they can't cultivate at all.

Forced cultivation is not a good thing either.

Therefore, this secret art was only aimed at the geniuses of the human race, making them promote from ordinary geniuses to top geniuses.

Subsequently.

Ye Tiancai began to retreat and cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body.

The cultivation of these two holy bodies is also very difficult, not weaker than the mixed yuan holy body, once the cultivation fails, it will completely fall.

Ye Tian copied his body, then entered the Dark Forbidden Realm and began to cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body.

Day by day, once the cultivation failed, he entered the time array, spent 10,000 years in the fastest time, and then copied a body and continued to cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body.

In this way, tens of thousands of years passed.

I don't know how many failures I have experienced, and finally on this day.

Ye Tian finally practiced the Black Yuan Holy Body, of course, this was only a copy of the body and practiced into the Black Yuan Holy Body, and it was the first time he had practiced it, and he also needed to improve the success rate to ensure that nothing went wrong, and the body dared to cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body.

So, Ye Tian dispersed and copied his body and continued to cultivate again.

Failure, success, failure, and success!

After practicing like this, Ye Tian learned more and more about the Black Yuan Holy Body, and finally guaranteed the success rate completely, and it was unlikely that he would fail, Ye Tian's main body entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, ready to cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body.
